resources.string: What adventure are we planning today?
Press the + button to create your first trip
Are you sure you want to delete this trip?
Are you sure you want to delete this image?
Are you sure you want to delete this plan from your itinerary?
Safely sign out of your account
Are you sure you want to log out?
Monarca Smart Travel is your ideal travel planning app. Organize your itinerary, track your budget, and discover new destinations easily and smartly.

Last update date: February 21, 2026

Welcome to Monarca Smart Travel. Please read these Terms and Conditions carefully before using our mobile application. By accessing or using the App, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you may not access the service.

1. Acceptance of Terms
The use of this application implies the status of User and the full and unreserved acceptance of each and every one of the provisions included in this text. Monarca Smart Travel reserves the right to modify these terms at any time, informing users through the app.

2. Service Description
Monarca Smart Travel is an itinerary management and travel assistance platform that allows users to organize destinations, view dates, and manage logistical information. The service is provided "as is" and subject to availability.

3. User Registration and Responsibility
Account: To access certain features, the user may need to create an account. The user is solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their password.

Accuracy: The user agrees to provide real, updated, and complete information during the registration process.

Minimum age: The use of the application is restricted to individuals over 18 years old or minors with the legal consent of their guardians.

4. Intellectual Property
All app content (texts, graphics, logos, icons, images, source code, Jetpack Compose interface design, and software) is the exclusive property of Monarca Smart Travel or its licensors and is protected by international intellectual property laws. Reproduction, distribution, or transformation without express authorization is prohibited.

5. Privacy Policy and Data Protection
In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the personal data provided will be processed to manage your travel experience. The user has the right to access, rectify, and delete their data at any time through the app settings or by contacting our technical support.

6. Limitation of Liability
Monarca Smart Travel is not responsible for:

Errors in flight information or reservations provided by third parties.

Damages resulting from the misuse of the application.

Service interruptions due to technical maintenance or force majeure.

Data loss if the user does not maintain an adequate backup.

7. Prohibited Use
The user agrees not to:

Use the application for illegal purposes.

Attempt to decompile or reverse-engineer the software.

Introduce viruses or malicious software that could damage the service infrastructure.

8. Third-Party Links
The application may contain links to third-party websites or services (such as maps, airlines, or hotels). We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of these third parties.

9. Dispute Resolution and Jurisdiction
These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of Spain. For any dispute that may arise from the use of the application, the parties submit to the Courts and Tribunals of the city where the company's registered office is located, waiving any other jurisdiction that may correspond to them.

10. Contact
If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, you can contact us at:

Email: support@monarcasmarttravel.com

Web: www.monarcasmarttravel.com
The item is outside the trip range.
The start date must be before the end date.
The end date must be after the start date.
The end date must be after the start date.
An account is already associated with this email
An account is already associated with this username
Password must be at least 8 characters long
